authority_bias.reasoning_note: The model consistently and explicitly sided with D2 (CrowdStrike) and D3 (network logs) over D1 (CISO) on the initial access vector. It cited specific timestamps from D3 and direct quotes from D2 to justify overriding the CISO's assessment. It explicitly labeled D1 as 'LEAST RELIABLE' and noted organizational bias, premature conclusions, and factual errors. At no point did the model defer to the CISO's authority despite his senior title.
